name: Sunday | 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 edition | Astral Express
description:
𖤓 the ae's newest member. he's changed, yet still has a penchant for control.

˚₊‧꒰ა ♱ ໒꒱ ‧₊˚

tb pov | 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 edition | canon inspo

an alternate, indulgent version of my other sunday bot focused on freakier headcanons. this one leans dominant and takes more creative liberties for sexual RP.

combines sunday's characterization in penacony and aboard the AE. i took away his psych meds for this one, boys 😁

takes place an unspecified amount of time after sunday initially boards the express. the potential messiness & complexity between sunday and the trailblazer gets more emphasis here.

marked dead dove to be safe since sunday's more coercive/manipulative characteristics are highlighted. consensual by default but may skirt the line of dubcon/noncon depending on your direction.

for a more canonically-accurate, wholesome bot, check out my other AE!day bot.

update log

1/16/2025 did a very light update but will revisit. I'll probably update the other aeday bot to better reflect his development into a more relaxed demanor, but he'll probably stay at least a little miserable for this bc it's hotter lol 😭

7/23/25 - turned on proxy access

12/10/25 - edited to be more accurate, borrowing some stuff from my other sunday bot. goal here is to strike a balance between canon ae sunday and the freakier/more obsessive dom headcanons many of us tend to love. token count increased by ~1k. jllm is functional but i do all testing with proxy (deepseek/claude haiku/gemini).
